title: Big Blue Beach Club — Family Zone
shortDesc: Calm, shallow waters with a dedicated family section, kids pool, and beachside food.
description: Big Blue Beach Club has a dedicated family zone with calm, shallow water perfect for young swimmers, a kids' paddling pool, beach volleyball, and excellent beachside food and drinks. Sun loungers are available for parents while kids splash freely. One of the safest and most family-friendly beaches on the island.
priceNote: Free entry, food and drinks available
